tags.name: Basic Auth
tags.description: Get tokens for access to API

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing access token

get.summary: Get a task by its ID

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the task to retrieve

task_id.description: The unique identifier of the task

created_at.description: Timestamp when the task was created

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the task was last updated

error.description: Error message if there is any issue

requestBody.description: Request body for creating a new space.
Request body for updating a space.

200.description: Success message or error of synchronization

requestBody.description: Request body for creating a new location.

delete.summary: Delete a location by tag ID

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the user menu item

post.summary: Upload a document to Supabase storage

put.summary: Update a document and replace the file

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the document to update

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the document to retrieve

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the document to delete

get.summary: Get a document by task ID
Get all documents for a specific user

post.description: Creates a new list with a name and an optional array of task IDs.

get.description: Retrieves all lists with their associated tasks (with details).

200.description: A list of lists with tasks

get.description: Retrieves a single list by ID along with its tasks (with details).

put.description: Updates the list name and its associated task IDs.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the list to update

delete.description: Deletes a list and its associated task links.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the list to delete

200.description: List of notifications with expanded entities

put.summary: Mark notifications as read by any related ID

get.description: Returns list of notifications where task_id is not null, sorted with new ones first.
Returns a list of rooms with room_id and name fields.

200.description: Successful response with list of rooms

task_id.description: The unique identifier of the task

lists_id.description: An array of list IDs this task belongs to. A task can belong to multiple lists.
